header_note: These workflows guide Analytical (plan-review) reasoning. They are NOT legal source. Every gap finding must be paired with a verbatim citation from the original SBC 801 / SBC 201 PDF section referenced here.

workflows.use_case: produce a gap matrix between submitted drawings and applicable SBC requirements
workflows.summary_ar: إنتاج مصفوفة الفجوات (Gap Matrix) بين الرسومات المقدمة والمتطلبات المطبقة من SBC 801/201، مع تحديد كل فجوة ومصدرها.
workflows.summary_en: Produce a Gap Matrix between submitted drawings and applicable SBC 801 / SBC 201 requirements, identifying each gap and its source section.

ar: ما مساحة كل طابق وعدد الطوابق فوق منسوب التسوية؟
en: What is the occupancy group and sub-classification?
What is the area per floor and number of stories above grade?
What is the code edition under review (SBC 801-CC-2024)?

decision_steps_summary: Step 1: Determine applicable requirement set per occupancy and height (sprinkler 903.2.x, alarm 907.2.x, standpipe 905.3, smoke control 909, egress Ch. 10).
Step 2: For each requirement, search drawings for evidence (system shown / capacity stated / location identified).
Step 3: Mark each requirement as Found / Missing / Ambiguous; cite drawing sheet + code section.
Step 4: Aggregate into gap matrix output.

workflows.use_case: list required active and passive fire-protection systems for the project
workflows.summary_ar: حصر الأنظمة المطلوبة (رش، إنذار، تحكم بالدخان، أنابيب رأسية، تشطيبات داخلية) لكل طابق ولكل إشغال مع مصادرها.
workflows.summary_en: Enumerate required systems (sprinkler, alarm, smoke control, standpipe, interior finish class) per floor and occupancy with their source sections.

ar: ما الإشغال في كل طابق وما مساحته بالمتر المربع؟
كم حمولة الشاغلين في كل طابق؟
هل المبنى شاهق أو يحتوي بهوا متعدد الطوابق أو مجمعا تجاريا؟
en: What is the occupancy on each floor and its area in square metres?
What is the occupant load per floor?
Is the building a high-rise, atrium, or covered mall?

decision_steps_summary: Step 1: For each floor, evaluate sprinkler triggers per Section 903.2 family.
Step 2: Evaluate alarm triggers per Section 907.2.
Step 4: Evaluate smoke control per Section 909 + SBC 201 402/403/404/405/410.
Step 5: Determine interior finish class per Table 803.3 (sprinklered vs non-sprinklered column).
Step 6: Output a per-floor matrix with source citations.

workflows.use_case: map every visible drawing element to the SBC section it satisfies (or fails to satisfy)
workflows.summary_ar: ربط كل عنصر مرئي في الرسومات (مخارج، رشاشات، كواشف، علامات، إضاءة طوارئ) بقسم الكود الذي يستوفيه.
workflows.summary_en: Map every visible drawing element (exits, sprinklers, detectors, signage, emergency lighting) to the SBC section it satisfies.

ar: هل توفر مجموعة الرسومات بصيغة قابلة للتحليل؟
en: Is the drawing set available in machine-readable form?
What is the revision number and date of the drawings?

decision_steps_summary: Step 1: For each drawn fire-protection element, identify the code chapter that governs it (sprinkler -> 903; alarm -> 907; egress -> Ch. 10; finishes -> 803; standpipe -> 905; smoke control -> 909).
Step 2: Pin each element to a specific section (e.g. an emergency-lighting layout cites 1008).
Step 3: Mark elements lacking a clear code anchor as Unanchored and ask the designer.

workflows.use_case: list every required drawing element that is absent or ambiguous in the submitted set
workflows.summary_ar: قائمة بكل عنصر مطلوب لم يظهر أو يظهر غامضا في مجموعة الرسومات، مع المصدر القانوني لكل عنصر.
workflows.summary_en: List every required drawing element that is missing or ambiguous in the submitted set, with the legal source for each.

ar: هل تم إنتاج مصفوفة الأنظمة المطلوبة (analytical-required-systems-matrix)؟
هل تم إنتاج خريطة الأدلة في الرسومات (analytical-drawing-evidence-to-code-section)؟
en: Has the required-systems matrix (analytical-required-systems-matrix) been produced?
Has the drawing-evidence map (analytical-drawing-evidence-to-code-section) been produced?

decision_steps_summary: Step 1: Cross-reference required-systems matrix against drawing-evidence map.
Step 2: For each required item without matching drawing evidence, emit a missing-evidence entry with code citation.
Step 3: For each ambiguous drawing reference, emit a clarification request.
Step 4: Output ranked list (critical / major / minor) with code citations.
